requests.prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Portable LED Lamp. The scene shows a small bedside/desk surface. Use one adult hand with medium skin tone as the only moving person or hand. A closed paperback book with cream pages is. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A single continuous tabletop shot begins with a compact portable LED lamp from the provided reference sitting centered on a light wood bedside table. To the left is a closed paperback book with cream pages; to the right is a small beige canvas travel pouch. The background is a plain matte light‑gray wall. The room is dim with a cool tint, and the lamp is off. The camera is steady, eye‑level, framing the lamp and nearby props closely. After a brief beat, one adult hand wearing a neutral long‑sleeve sweater cuff enters from the right. The hand gently taps the top of the lamp. The lamp turns on and immediately casts a soft, warm glow that visibly blooms outward from the lamp, warming the table surface. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.

image_inputs.description: Video start frame used as first-frame I2V conditioning by the video backend.
Product identity reference for optional start-frame image-edit generation. It is not sent to the video backend as a separate product-reference conditioning image.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Exaggerate enables a bold, scene-wide warm-light transformation anchored to the lamp, quickly communicating cozy ambiance and portability in one shot without relying on tiny indicators or complex mechanisms.

candidate_categories.reason: A dramatic cool-to-warm scene shift makes the lighting benefit obvious and attention-grabbing in seconds.
candidate_categories.risk: Overly strong light effects could look unnatural if not grounded in the lamp.

candidate_categories.reason: A simple on/off demo showing a big warm light patch is clear and credible.
candidate_categories.risk: May feel less attention-grabbing than an exaggerated shift.

candidate_categories.reason: Close inspection can show compact size and diffuser quality.
candidate_categories.risk: Might not convey cozy ambiance as viscerally within 6 seconds.

creative_design.selling_angle: Instant cozy warmth plus pocketable portability.
creative_design.visual_grammar: One-take tabletop close-to-medium shot, static camera, exaggerated warm-light bloom anchored to the lamp, minimal props.
creative_design.proof_mechanism: A visible cool-to-warm lighting transformation that radiates from the lamp and fills the desk and wall, with the book and pouch warming in color as credible surfaces.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: Dim, cool-toned desk with the lamp off—quiet and slightly stark.
creative_design.action_arc: A single hand enters, taps the lamp; a warm halo expands across the surface and wall; the hand lifts the glowing lamp briefly to show compact size, then places it back near the pouch.
creative_design.payoff: Steady warm, cozy scene with the small lamp glowing beside the travel pouch—portable comfort confirmed.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: Avoids precise button press depiction, tiny LEDs, or complex props. Uses a single hand and stable tabletop to show an obvious warm-light bloom. Minimal set: book and pouch act as large, readable surfaces that visibly warm. One continuous shot with a small lift action only.

metadata.overlay_text: Tap for warm, cozy light. Compact & travel‑ready.
metadata.audio_direction: A playful pluck on tap, followed by a gentle warm pad swell as the light blooms; subtle room tone throughout.
metadata.visual_prompt:
A single continuous tabletop shot begins with a compact portable LED lamp from the provided reference sitting centered on a light wood bedside table. To the left is a closed paperback book with cream pages; to the right is a small beige canvas travel pouch. The background is a plain matte light‑gray wall. The room is dim with a cool tint, and the lamp is off. The camera is steady, eye‑level, framing the lamp and nearby props closely.
After a brief beat, one adult hand wearing a neutral long‑sleeve sweater cuff enters from the right. The hand gently taps the top of the lamp. The lamp turns on and immediately casts a soft, warm glow that visibly blooms outward from the lamp, warming the table surface, the book’s cream pages, the pouch fabric, and the wall behind into a cozy, amber tone. Keep the glow anchored to the lamp so it feels like a natural light source rather than a special effect.
The hand then lifts the glowing lamp smoothly, holding it just above the table to show that it’s compact and easy to carry while the warm halo continues to illuminate the area. After a short pause, the hand places the lamp back down beside the pouch. End on a steady, warmly lit composition of the lamp glowing on the table with the book and pouch softly illuminated. No other objects appear; no text or logos in the scene.

critic_expectation.purpose: Judge whether the raw video is a plausible product demo for Portable LED Lamp.
hard_requirements: single continuous raw video shot with steady one-take continuity

complete direct prompt: A single continuous tabletop shot begins with a compact portable LED lamp from the provided reference sitting centered on a light wood bedside table. To the left is a closed paperback book with cream pages; to the right is a small beige canvas travel pouch..
physically plausible handling of the product by one main subject
soft_context: The shot may hint at this customer context: Harsh, cold lighting or no light at all makes late-night reading or working unpleasant, and bulky lamps are inconvenient.
Focus the judgment on the requested product action, proof visibility, and one-take continuity.

Creative design expectation: ad_category=exaggerate; hook=Dim, cool-toned desk with the lamp off—quiet and slightly stark.; proof=A visible cool-to-warm lighting transformation that radiates from the lamp and fills the desk and wall, with the book and pouch warming in color as credible surfaces.; payoff=Steady warm, cozy scene.

Expected subject and scene style from asset memory: One adult hand with medium skin tone; clean, natural look.; Long-sleeve neutral knit sweater cuff entering from right.; A small bedside/desk surface.
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
main product action is visible and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
ad_category intent is recognizable through the opening, action arc, proof mechanism, and payoff
